title: plan-loop principal-engineer critique
description: The structured review the principal-engineer role returns each cycle. verdict is 'pass' only when no blocking or major issues remain.

score.description: Overall plan quality against the rubric.

issues.description: Concrete problems with the plan; each names a fix the reviser can apply.

task_id.description: the task this concerns, if any.

coverage_gaps.description: objective/end-state aspects no task covers yet.

suggested_skills.description: installed skills that could accelerate or de-risk a task.
